title: hedyotis srilankensis
intro: Hedyotis srilankensis, also known as Srilankans or Smallflower Hedyotis, is a flowering plant species native to Sri Lanka. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions like eczema. Hedyotis srilankensis is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
